intro: This archive contains 16 articles on privilege escalation from April 13 to April 21, 2026, detailing a series of high and critical severity vulnerabilities. The threat actor Chaotic Eclipse was prominently observed, exploiting flaws including CVE-2026-5490 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2026-25203, CVE-2026-33104, CVE-2026-34054, and CVE-2026-5424. These incidents had a global impact, primarily affecting the education, digital signage, enterprise, government, and healthcare sectors. The severity mix of the covered vulnerabilities consisted of 13 high, 2 critical, and 1 medium severity finding.
